summary: Tested P0 features for CLT Synapse ERP Iteration 78. All core features verified working: (1) Anzil has role 'quality_control' and 0 students assigned, (2) /api/dashboard/closure-time endpoint returns agent-wise closure time analytics with summary, (3) /api/leads with date_field=any returns leads where created_at OR enrolled_at is in range, (4) Sales CRM PeriodFilter shows 'This Month' default with NO date field toggle, (5) Sales Dashboard displays 'Lead Closure Time' table with agent breakdown, (6) Dashboard stats returns avg_closure_days field, (7) CS page agent list does NOT include Anzil.

minor.issue: Response time ~6s (slightly above 5s threshold) - may need further optimization

issues: Most agents show 0d closure time - this is expected for historical leads where assigned_at wasn't tracked, but some agents (Aswani K: 0.2d, Mohamadaffan: 1.1d) show actual values

passed_tests: Anzil has 0 students assigned (verified via API)
Closure-time endpoint returns summary with avg_days, min_days, max_days, total_closures
Closure-time endpoint returns agent-wise breakdown with all required fields
Closure-time endpoint works with period filter (period=this_month)
date_field=any includes enrolled leads in date range
CS agents list excludes quality_control role users
Sales CRM: Period filter shows 'This Month' by default
Sales CRM: Date field toggle NOT present (using date_field=any)
Sales Dashboard: Closure Time Analytics card visible
Sales Dashboard: Card shows 'Lead Closure Time' title
Sales Dashboard: Card shows agent breakdown table
CS Page: Anzil NOT in agent tabs (Angel Mary, Nasida VN, Karthika P.K, Falja Nizar, Della Mariyam Shaji visible)
critical_code_review_comments: server.py line 3288-3306: date_field='any' correctly uses $or to match both created_at and enrolled_at
server.py line 8798-8868: /api/dashboard/closure-time endpoint correctly aggregates closure_days by agent with role-based filtering
server.py line 7637-7645: Dashboard stats correctly calculates avg_closure_days for this month
SalesDashboard.jsx line 108: Correctly fetches closure-time data in fetchFilteredData
SalesDashboard.jsx line 778-830: Closure Time Analytics card correctly displays agent breakdown
SalesCRMPage.jsx line 897-899: PeriodFilter correctly wraps onChange with date_field='any'
PeriodFilter.jsx: No dateFields prop passed from SalesCRMPage, so no toggle is shown

success_rate.backend: 92% (12/13 tests passed - 1 minor performance test failed)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing data. closure_days was backfilled for 976 enrolled leads.
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 features for iteration 78 fully tested and verified: (1) Anzil transferred to quality_control role with 0 students - his 6 students were reassigned to Della and Falja, (2) /api/dashboard/closure-time endpoint working with agent-wise breakdown, (3) date_field=any filter working for leads endpoint, (4) Sales CRM PeriodFilter no longer shows date field toggle, (5) Sales Dashboard shows Lead Closure Time card with 976 deals. Note: Most closure_days values are 0 because assigned_at wasn't tracked for historical leads, but new enrollments will have accurate closure times.

anzil_role_change.verification: API test confirmed role and student count

date_field_any.implementation: server.py line 3296-3304 uses $or to match created_at OR enrolled_at
date_field_any.verification: API test confirmed leads returned with date_field=any

sales_crm_period_filter.implementation: SalesCRMPage.jsx line 897-899 wraps onChange with date_field='any'
